title: SCP-8805: The Pennsylvanian Enigma

clips.visual_description: Extreme close-up on a flickering CRT monitor, green text on black. Lines of code scroll rapidly, intercut with Traditional Chinese characters for database queries (e.g., "關注組織", "機動特遣隊", "基金會設施"). The screen briefly pixelates, then sharpens to "SCP-8805".
clips.dialogue: Querying secure database... Multiple entries found... Filtering for primary anomaly designation: SCP-8805.
clips.sound_vibe: Low, pulsating synth drone, digital clicks, static bursts, and a distinct server hum. A sense of data processing and hidden information.

clips.visual_description: A slow, ominous aerial drone shot panning over a vast, dense forest in late autumn. Patches of mist cling to the valleys, and the trees, mostly bare, form an unbroken, ancient canopy. The light is diffused, sickly gray.
clips.dialogue: The ███ █████ forest of Pennsylvania. A place of quiet, primal beauty. And, as discovered by the Foundation, unspeakable secrets.
clips.sound_vibe: Ethereal, melancholic orchestral pads. Distant, mournful wind sounds with subtle, unsettling rustles. Low, sustained environmental drone.

clips.visual_description: A pair of worn, mud-splattered hunting boots and a forgotten backpack lie at the edge of a narrow, overgrown dirt track. The scene is still, eerily devoid of human presence. A few scattered spent rifle casings.
clips.dialogue: June, ████. Nathan Tucker and Cameron Hoffman, experienced hunters, entered these woods. Their objective: deer.
clips.sound_vibe: Sharp, dry rustle of leaves. A lone, distant bird call, quickly fading. A low, foreboding thrum.

clips.visual_description: A close-up on a crumpled, muddy "MISSING" flyer pinned to a tree trunk, featuring a faded photo of two smiling men. The text is partially obscured by rain streaks.
clips.dialogue: Days turned into weeks. Hoffman's wife grew concerned. The local sheriff initially dismissed her fears.
clips.sound_vibe: Muffled, anxious whispers. The tearing sound of paper in the wind. A subtle, building string tension.

clips.visual_description: An abandoned, mud-splattered pickup truck, its driver's side door slightly ajar, sits eerily silent amidst dense, dark trees. A single, half-eaten sandwich lies molding on the dashboard.
clips.dialogue: But her persistence led to a search. Their vehicle was found here, deserted.
clips.sound_vibe: Eerie silence, broken by the distant, melancholic call of a raven. A faint, almost imperceptible creak of the truck door.

clips.visual_description: A close-up, ground-level shot of a discarded hunting rifle, partially buried in wet leaves and mud. Nearby, the bloated, partially scavenged carcass of a fawn lies unnaturally still.
clips.dialogue: Tucker's rifle, along with the remains of their quarry. But no sign of the hunters.
clips.sound_vibe: Buzzing flies (subtle, unsettling). The dull thud of unseen footsteps. A low, guttural growl, then silence.

clips.visual_description: A rapid montage: flashing newspaper headlines about "Forest Disappearances," blurred TV news snippets, a red "SEARCH CANCELED" stamp flashing over a wide shot of the desolate forest.
clips.dialogue: lack of evidence...search suspended...no further leads...
clips.sound_vibe: Distorted news jingles, muffled static, an increasing sense of futility and resignation through descending string motifs.

clips.visual_description: A map of the Appalachian trail, with three red dots representing tourists. A hand, gloved, circles the dots, then moves to circle the ███ █████ forest area, drawing a connection.
clips.dialogue: July. Three Italian tourists vanished while hiking the Appalachians. Later, the Foundation linked their disappearance to the forest.
clips.sound_vibe: Soft, rhythmic clicks. A low, investigative hum. A rising, questioning string note.

clips.visual_description: A forensic tent, dimly lit, set up in a remote, overgrown field. Investigators in hazmat suits move cautiously around a body bag being zipped closed. Rain drips.
clips.dialogue: September. Cameron Hoffman's body was discovered by hikers. Badly decomposed, cause of death undetermined. Declared an accidental death.
clips.sound_vibe: Dripping rain. Distant, mournful woodwind. The chilling rasp of a zipper.

clips.visual_description: A digital map on a Foundation monitor. Five new red markers appear rapidly in and around the forest, signifying new disappearances. A "PRIORITY ONE" alert flashes across the screen.
clips.dialogue: Five additional disappearances. Anomaly escalation confirmed. Foundation intervention initiated. Public awareness suppressed.
clips.sound_vibe: Urgent, fast-paced electronic beeps. A low, rising synth pulse, indicating growing threat and Foundation mobilization. Red alert siren (subtle).

clips.visual_description: A cozy, autumnal scene: a family home in rural Pennsylvania. A porch light glows. Silhouettes of a family waving goodbye to four men in hunting gear who get into a pickup truck. A sense of normalcy before dread.
clips.dialogue: November 29th. Oliver Campbell, Asher Hall, Theodore Latch, and his son, Theo Latch Jr., departed for their annual hunting trip.
clips.sound_vibe: Warm, gentle acoustic guitar melody. Distant, happy chatter and laughter. The sound of a truck engine starting, then fading.

clips.visual_description: A rapid cut to a desolate, snow-dusted forest road. The same pickup truck from the previous scene is parked, empty, its doors closed, headlights off.
clips.dialogue: None of them returned.
clips.sound_vibe: A sudden, chilling silence. The gentle crunch of snow under unseen feet. A single, ominous bass note.

clips.visual_description: Inside a dark, cramped space, the camera shakes violently and frantically. Blurred, distorted flashes of sickly yellow light appear through minuscule gaps in a rough, burlap-like material. The sensation is one of being utterly trapped and disoriented. Wetness can be seen collecting on the burlap.
clips.dialogue: 救我！天啊，你一定要救救我，我不知道自己在什麼鬼地方。我動不了。我覺得自己是被 [static, then a gurgling sound] 抓住了。又黑又濕，真的濕透了！(Help me! Oh God, you have to save me, I don't know where the hell I am. I can't move. I think I've been grabbed by [static, then a gurgling sound]. It's dark and wet, really soaked!)
clips.sound_vibe: Intense, ragged, claustrophobic breathing. Wet, squelching sounds. Rough fabric scraping. A deep, unsettling, primal growl underlying the static, almost imperceptible.

clips.visual_description: A close-up on a vintage landline phone receiver, dropped on a desk, still connected by its coiled cord. The "CALL ENDED" message flashes erratically on a small, grainy display nearby, then solidifies.
clips.dialogue: 我叫西奧，西奧．拉奇。我不知道自己在哪──(My name is Theo, Theo Latch. I don't know where I am--)
clips.sound_vibe: The sudden, jarring click of the phone disconnecting. A flatline tone, prolonged and chilling. Then, dead silence, unnerving in its complete emptiness.

clips.visual_description: An aerial drone shot, slowly circling over a vast, snow-covered forest. The white landscape is stark and beautiful, but the silence feels oppressive. Distant, almost invisible searchlights comb the area, futile in their effort. The cold, pale grey sky reflects the grim mood.
clips.dialogue: Triangulation pinpointed the general area, but no specific location. The search continued, increasingly desperate.
clips.sound_vibe: Cold, echoing wind. Distant, ghostly choir. A sense of profound loss and an overwhelming, indifferent nature.

clips.visual_description: A close-up on a gloved hand digging through frozen soil, revealing a patch of dark, wet earth. The hand then pulls back, revealing a tattered piece of checkered fabric, possibly from a hunting jacket.
clips.dialogue: The harsh winter halted all conventional search efforts. Two volunteers went missing. The forest held its secrets close.
clips.sound_vibe: Grinding sounds of tools on frozen earth. Sharp, cold gusts of wind. A single, ominous cello note, held.

clips.visual_description: A heavy, rust-stained padlock on a thick chain strung across a dirt path. A "NO TRESPASSING - DANGER" sign, half-obscured by fresh snow and ice, is visible beside it. The cold, frosty air is palpable. The padlock seems to glow faintly in the desaturated light.
clips.dialogue: All public access to the ███ █████ forest was revoked. The Foundation initiated full containment protocols. But the anomaly had already taken root. Deep within.
clips.sound_vibe: The metallic groan of the frozen padlock, amplified. Sharp gusts of wind with crystalline chimes. A chilling, low-frequency rumble suggesting something ancient and powerful stirring beneath the frozen surface.

clips.visual_description: Text on a black screen: "DECEMBER 7, ████." The text fades to black.
clips.sound_vibe: A low, sustained, bassy hum, building an oppressive sense of foreboding. A distant, hollow thud.

clips.visual_description: A desolate, rocky streambed, partially frozen, far from any significant body of water. A single Foundation agent in a full hazmat suit kneels beside a form covered by a pristine white sheet, contrasting sharply with the bleak surroundings. The ground is dry and cracked, devoid of life.
clips.dialogue: Asher Hall was found. His body discovered miles from any viable water source, in a landscape parched by winter.
clips.sound_vibe: The hollow, echoing sound of footsteps on frozen stone. A low, guttural drone that feels like it vibrates in the bones, accompanied by a faint, distant, gurgling sound.

clips.visual_description: A sterile, clinical screen displaying an autopsy report. A single word, "DROWNING," is highlighted in stark, blood-red against the white background. A gloved hand points to it, then slowly retracts, as if in disbelief.
clips.dialogue: Cause of death: Drowning. An impossible contradiction. A mystery that defied all logic, hinting at an unnatural force at play.
clips.sound_vibe: Clinical beeps and the soft hum of medical equipment. A high-pitched, sustained synth chord, subtly dissonant and unsettling. The faint, almost subliminal bubbling sound becomes slightly more pronounced.

clips.visual_description: A security monitor displaying grainy, infrared footage. The date and time "12-23-████, 03:17 AM" is prominently visible. The image flickers with heavy static, showing fleeting glimpses of dense forest before settling on a small, snow-dusted clearing.
clips.dialogue: Initiating playback: Tracking camera feed, Site-██, Outpost 8805. Source: Unclassified.
clips.sound_vibe: Heavy white noise and static. Digital clicks and the mechanical whir of a tape deck engaging. A low, persistent hum, building tension.

clips.visual_description: The infrared footage stabilizes into a stark, green-tinted image. A large, visibly pregnant doe, appearing highly agitated, paces back and forth in the snow-dusted clearing. Its breath plumes visibly in the cold air. The pregnancy seems unnaturally advanced, almost grotesque, for the late season.
clips.sound_vibe: Eerie silence, broken only by the doe's heavy, ragged breathing and the soft crunch of its hooves on snow. A high-frequency, almost painful, subliminal whine begins to emerge from the background.

clips.visual_description: The doe collapses onto the snow, thrashing violently, hind legs kicking. Its body convulses. Its hindquarters begin to distend and deform at an unnatural rate, stretching the skin taut.
clips.sound_vibe: Visceral, wet tearing and squelching sounds intensify. Deep, strained animal groans, almost human in their agony. The high-frequency whine peaks into a painful, resonant crescendo.

clips.visual_description: A close-up, horrifying image in infrared: a small, dark, indistinct object begins to emerge from the doe's birth canal, stretching the opening grotesquely. It is clearly not a fawn; its shape is wrong, almost geometric, before revealing itself.
clips.sound_vibe: A sharp, sickening tearing sound. A sudden, high-pitched string shriek. The animal's groans become more frantic, desperate.

clips.visual_description: A clear, horrifying image in infrared: a human head, pale and lifeless, emerges slowly, agonizingly, from the doe's grotesquely distended birth canal. The doe's eyes are wide, unblinking, glassy, reflecting the camera's infrared light with an unnatural glow. Amniotic fluid drips, steaming slightly in the cold.
clips.sound_vibe: Intense gurgling, squelching sounds, interspersed with sharp, wet snaps. The frantic, strained panting of the doe. A sudden, sharp, chilling string dissonance, piercing the soundscape.

clips.visual_description: The doe strains, standing with its rear body grotesquely swollen, almost twice its natural size. A pale, limp human arm, shockingly clear, hangs out, swaying slightly. The doe struggles, its movements slow and heavy, as the rest of the form is pushed out, a horrifying mockery of birth. The doe's head shakes rhythmically with the contractions.
clips.sound_vibe: A sickening, prolonged 'rip' sound, then heavy, wet thuds. The doe lets out a low, guttural, almost mechanical groan, devoid of natural animal sound.

clips.visual_description: The human corpse, fully expelled, drops onto the snow-covered ground with a wet, final thud. It's clearly identifiable as a male body, pale and strangely pristine. Immediately, the doe's hindquarters rapidly, unnaturally, shrink back to their normal size, as if the anomaly never happened.
clips.dialogue: Oliver Campbell. Returned. In the most impossible, horrifying way imaginable. A reanimation. A delivery.
clips.sound_vibe: A final, sickening squelch and thud, echoing. The high-frequency whine abruptly cuts out, leaving an eerie, profound silence.

clips.visual_description: The doe stands motionless, staring at the corpse for a long, unsettling moment. Its eyes remain blank, devoid of any discernible emotion or recognition. Then, with a sudden, swift movement, it turns, a predator turning away from its kill.
clips.sound_vibe: Absolute silence, save for the sound of a single, cold gust of wind passing over the scene.

clips.visual_description: The doe bolts into the deep, dark, infrared-lit forest, disappearing into the dense foliage in a flash of green blur. The camera feed briefly goes to static as it loses sight of the animal, then returns to focus on the empty space.
clips.sound_vibe: A sudden, violent rustle of leaves and branches, then the static buzzes loudly, slowly fading into a low hum.

clips.visual_description: A final, wide shot of the clearing. Only the single, pale human corpse lies abandoned in the pristine snow, a stark, disturbing centerpiece. The forest looms, dark, indifferent, and infinitely vast, around it. The infrared lens slightly distorts the image, adding to the pervasive unreality.
clips.dialogue: The forest remains. Its true nature, unknown. Its horrors, still waiting. Still breeding.
clips.sound_vibe: A low, guttural, sustained drone, growing steadily in intensity, accompanied by a faint, distant, predatory growl that slowly fades into the drone.

clips.visual_description: The Foundation database interface returns. The "SCP-8805" file is now open, displaying key information: "Object Class: Euclid", "Special Containment Procedures: Ongoing. Area Denial Active. Biological Threat Assessment: Elevated." A stark red "CLASSIFIED - EYES ONLY - O5 COMMAND RETAINED" stamp flashes repeatedly and prominently across the screen, then freezes.
clips.dialogue: Anomaly designation: SCP-8805. Status: Active. Containment integrity: Compromised. Threat level: Uncontained, Extreme. Further research initiated. Data locked. End Transmission.
clips.sound_vibe: Intense, driving, rhythmic electronic music with deep, pulsating bass, conveying urgency and an enduring, unresolved threat. Digital alarms pulse subtly, then a final, resonant, low thud.

global_mood: Ominous, clinical, and deeply unsettling, with a pervasive sense of dread and existential horror. The color palette will be desaturated, emphasizing cool blues, grays, and muted earth tones for the forest, contrasting with stark, sterile whites and reds for Foundation interfaces and critical data. Shadows will be deep and consuming, particularly in the forest scenes.
